name: belonging-a-culture-of-place
description: bell hooks' essays on home, belonging, race, and the land — returning to Kentucky, reclaiming roots, and building a culture of place through community and care.
useCase: Understand what it means to belong to a place, the politics of returning home, and how community and land can heal historical wounds.
knownRisks: Essay collection — not a single argument but multiple perspectives
Some essays are deeply personal while others are academic
hooks' intersectional perspective may challenge some readers
